title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Turning off devices
scenario: Turning off one of multiple paired Poly Bluetooth devices shows it as disconnected in Poly Studio Mobile app while remaining devices stay connected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure at least two Poly Bluetooth audio devices (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200 and Poly Savi 8220) are paired and connected to the app.
3. On the Home screen, verify that both devices are displayed and show a "Connected" status.
4. Power off the first Poly Bluetooth device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to turn it off).
5. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Power off the second Poly Bluetooth device.
7. Observe the Home screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app again.
expected: When the first device is powered off, it should show as "Disconnected" in the app, while the second device remains displayed and "Connected". When the second device is powered off, it should also show as "Disconnected".
